goal: Convert discord_triage.yaml to use native plugins where possible, modernize remaining Python
summary: discord_triage.yaml fully modernized. Replaced Discord fetch with io.kestra.plugin.core.http.Request, summarization with io.kestra.plugin.ai.completion.ChatCompletion, and both LLM judges with io.kestra.plugin.ai.completion.Classification. Decomposed the single giant Python script into 4 focused modernized scripts (build_report, embed_and_search, emit_matched, upsert_and_threshold) using dependencies and taskRunner. Zero beforeCommands remain.
stepSummaries:
1. Replace Discord message fetch Python with io.kestra.plugin.core.http.Request [verified]
  2. Replace summarization Python with io.kestra.plugin.ai.completion.ChatCompletion [verified]
  3. Replace LLM Judge A and Judge B with io.kestra.plugin.ai.completion.Classification [verified]
  4. Modernize remaining Python scripts to use dependencies instead of beforeCommands [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.evidence: discord_triage.yaml: 1 io.kestra.plugin.core.http.Request, 1 io.kestra.plugin.ai.completion.ChatCompletion, 2 io.kestra.plugin.ai.completion.Classification, 4 modernized Python scripts, 0 beforeCommands
gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase 3 verification used real grep counts confirming native plugin presence and modernized syntax. Not proxy verification.

gateVerdicts.evidence: The flow preserves all original inputs, outputs, webhook trigger, and triage gating logic. The single giant Python script is decomposed into 4 focused scripts plus native tasks (HTTP, ChatCompletion, Classification, If). Business logic preserved: Discord fetch, summarization, embedding, GitHub search, memory search, LLM judges, upsert, threshold check.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was hybrid modernization: maximize declarative components while keeping Python only where no native equivalent exists. Achieved: Discord fetch is native HTTP, summarization is native ChatCompletion, judges are native Classification, and the embedding+search+upsert pipeline is modernized Python.

gateVerdicts.evidence: No deferred items. All 4 steps completed successfully.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. Phase complete with all steps verified.
